name: Macro Trading Desk
description: Run a macro-driven trading desk with conviction sizing and risk management
prerequisites: At least one exchange connected via /setup
workflow: 1. Ask arthur-hayes for the current macro thesis (DXY, yields, liquidity)
2. Ask raoul-pal for the cycle position and network value analysis
3. Compare their views — they may disagree, which is valuable
4. Ask risk-manager to size a position based on the consensus (or lack of it)
5. Ask execution-trader to plan a TWAP entry over 1 hour
6. Review and confirm the execution plan
expected_output: Macro thesis with supporting data, sized position proposal, and TWAP execution plan
failure_modes: Agents disagree on direction → risk-manager reduces size to reflect uncertainty
High volatility → execution-trader switches from TWAP to iceberg
Drawdown limit hit → risk-manager blocks new positions
